Product Features

  • [Soft & Feel Like Real Grass] - Here! If you are vexed how to choose artificial turf, just look at our realistic artificial grass, 4 tones & C shape, 84.6 oz/square.feet, you will get a thickness turf, soft, lusher and natural. Use for indoor outdoor flooring, be a dog potty training grass, or decor green easter party.
  • [High Quality Turf Grass] - Use superior impact PE&PP synthetic material, anti fade, waterproof, UV-resistant, frost-resistant, anti aging, odorless, wear-resistant, nonslip, and resilience. Passed the Durability & Fire resistance test, so never mind insolation and frost.
  • [Strong Water Permeability]- Synthetic grass runner with natural rubber(SBR) bottom, durable and not easy to tear. The groove design and drainage holes on the back, help dirty pass trough, easy to clean, no sewage on grass surface, and dry quickly.
  • [Multi-Purpose & Low Maintenance] - Care is simple, no mowing, no watering, no spraying, no fertilizing. Ideal decor for back/front yard, patio decor, gardens, balcony, terraces,gym, etc. Also as a dog pee grass pad. Suitable for all indoor and outdoor projects.
